476433.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
476433.transcript: Hey! We work pretty well together!

10450952.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
10450952.transcript: Now to put an end to this wolf!

14251971.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
14251971.transcript: Oh, where'd you learn how to do that?

43103037.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_1
43103037.transcript: We can't rest on our laurels just yet!

54753110.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_PL0600_1
54753110.transcript: We can't rest easy just yet, right?

66003177.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
66003177.transcript: My fire magic is red hot!

80594123.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_B
80594123.transcript: Oh, I saw what you guys did there! Nice!

85691007.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
85691007.transcript: Maybe I can handle this place.

91966514.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
91966514.transcript: Thanks. I know you're not one to give undeserved praise.

95561659.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
95561659.transcript: What's a god compared to the Grand Cipher crew?

99318165.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
99318165.transcript: You know, my ice magic's also nothing to sneeze at.

121910312.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
121910312.transcript: Did you split the earth with your sword?

123526549.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
123526549.transcript: Come on, guys! Take him out!

128774265.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
128774265.transcript: I think it's time to go all out.

137996186.label: PL0400_vo_ETC_quest_clear_1
137996186.transcript: Ha ha ha! That was a piece of cake!

143982347.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
143982347.transcript: Hey, you're not bad at this, General!

152363468.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
152363468.transcript: You really want to get in our way?

155249975.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
155249975.transcript: And that was just a taste.

168328315.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
168328315.transcript: You won't beat us this time. You hear me?

170082066.label: PL0400_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL0600
170082066.transcript: Can't just give up because things are tough.

175385452.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
175385452.transcript: Okay, Grandpa, let's get you back to bed.

175721804.label: PL0400_vo_NAV_throw_dispel_reaction_2
175721804.transcript: Only I get to have buffs around here.

177431316.label: PL0400_vo_CMM_emo_pose_6
177431316.transcript: Check it out! Nice staff, huh?

177697828.label: PL0400_vo_ETC_quest_clear_5
177697828.transcript: Woo! Did you see me back there?

182962926.label: PL0400_vo_CMM_emo_pose_4
182962926.transcript: Don't worry. I've got your back.

189653739.label: PL0400_vo_CMM_emo_win_2
189653739.transcript: Oh yeah! We saved the day!

193531285.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
193531285.transcript: Oh my gosh! That was awesome!

198636454.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
198636454.transcript: Let me know if you get hurt, okay?

199586921.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
199586921.transcript: Don't just stand there. We've got to get a move on.

203719128.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_la_C
203719128.transcript: It's all over for you, goons.

206852179.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
206852179.transcript: Id, I think you broke them.

207560064.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
207560064.transcript: Ugh, there's no end to you guys!

232720522.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
232720522.transcript: Nice try, lady. We know you're all talk.

241041184.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
241041184.transcript: Doesn't it hurt to punch with your bare fists?

264789149.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700
264789149.transcript: Yes! You handed them their butts on a platter!

272551945.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
272551945.transcript: Leave it to me! I'll clean them up in one blast!

275078503.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
275078503.transcript: You don't have to coddle me, you know.

278651079.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0100
278651079.transcript: Oh, that old hex? It was nothing.

278912550.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
278912550.transcript: Your face looks messed up when you yell.

286346286.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
286346286.transcript: Colossal Primal Beasts don't scare me a bit!

292493135.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
292493135.transcript: Look here, you evil pony! We've stepped up our game!

293244096.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
293244096.transcript: You really are a living legend!

295120532.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
295120532.transcript: What's the church doing with so many soldiers?

296675365.label: PL0400_vo_CMM_emo_thanks_3
296675365.transcript: I can always count on you!

297367165.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_PL0600_1
297367165.transcript: I can keep going, no problem.

313365705.label: PL0400_vo_NAV_hp_down_reaction_3
313365705.transcript: I'll get you back on your feet!

317499831.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
317499831.transcript: I want to be just like you!

324092803.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
324092803.transcript: You don't have to tell me twice. Bring it!

328963593.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
328963593.transcript: Could you please step off already?

334654048.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
334654048.transcript: Slow and steady wins the race!

335045900.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
335045900.transcript: Keep this up and the battle's ours!

344221492.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
344221492.transcript: So what if he has new tricks?

345596627.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
345596627.transcript: Cool! Now let's get out of here!

352345296.label: PL0400_vo_ETC_quest_clear_2
352345296.transcript: Oh yeah! We saved the day!

362365261.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
362365261.transcript: I'm old enough to manage my mana, thank you very much.

364567739.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
364567739.transcript: I think, I think they move in a pattern.

366614186.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
366614186.transcript: Id! We won't give up on you!

370436984.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
370436984.transcript: This cold is way worse than last time.

385052791.label: PL0400_vo_CMM_emo_win_1
385052791.transcript: Were you guys watching? I was awesome!

390989273.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
390989273.transcript: No turning back now, right guys?

409383221.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_C
409383221.transcript: And there's more where that came from!

439099082.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
439099082.transcript: You know, I think I'm starting to get used to this item.

442880504.label: PL0400_vo_CMM_emo_win_6
442880504.transcript: That was easy. Give me a challenge.

445247832.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
445247832.transcript: Are they trying to waste our time?

450596799.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_B
450596799.transcript: You could be a king for all I care. Get off our ship.

455023677.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
455023677.transcript: The real fight's just getting started.

471175241.label: PL0400_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_2
471175241.transcript: We need you back in there!

473751551.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
473751551.transcript: Let me show you how a real mage does it.

475830570.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
475830570.transcript: I am pretty mature for my age.

476661459.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
476661459.transcript: The Sky Realm is under our protection!

488692387.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
488692387.transcript: Invaluable? I like the sound of that.

492448403.label: PL0400_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_3
492448403.transcript: Get your head in the game, Io!

509228461.label: PL0400_vo_NAV_throw_default_reaction_3
509228461.transcript: Did you see that? Direct hit!

509987851.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
509987851.transcript: A primal who controls the wind! Guess I'll have to blow it away!

516568798.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
516568798.transcript: Nope. There's always bad guys to beat up.

535703059.label: PL0400_vo_CMM_emo_pose_1
535703059.transcript: How do you like my magic?

536628588.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
536628588.transcript: He can't beat us if we work together!

541691952.label: PL0400_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL0600_2
541691952.transcript: Yep. Let's get back to work.

555902082.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_PL0600_3
555902082.transcript: I have a lot to learn.

574470255.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
574470255.transcript: You don't have to remind me!

574627095.label: PL0400_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_A
574627095.transcript: If we're not careful, it could smash us to bits!

585723914.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C
585723914.transcript: Don't get ahead of yourself, okay?

587177393.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
587177393.transcript: Okay, that's enough out of you.

594254936.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
594254936.transcript: Thanks, Roland. You're pretty small, too.

614736965.label: PL0400_vo_NAV_just_move_reaction_PL0600_3
614736965.transcript: I wish I could do that.

627230122.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_rampage
627230122.transcript: I've got a few more tricks up my sleeve.

627422213.label: PL0400_vo_SP_charge_speak_2
627422213.transcript: Let me show you how it's done!

638987581.label: PL0400_vo_NAV_enemy_crush_parts_3
638987581.transcript: They're falling apart at the seams!

639855876.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
639855876.transcript: Get ready for the next one!

642157313.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
642157313.transcript: Let's blast the next one too!

643167020.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_overdrive
643167020.transcript: Then that means the fun's just begun!

648674099.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
648674099.transcript: We'll stop you, no matter what it takes!

649599478.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
649599478.transcript: Yeah! Go faster if you want!

659471572.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
659471572.transcript: Alchemy, huh? That might be neat.

661555469.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
661555469.transcript: You really got him there, didn't I?

665541796.label: PL0400_vo_CMM_emo_pose_5
665541796.transcript: Oh yeah! Io to the rescue!

682527952.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
682527952.transcript: Just wait till you see me at full power!

697882116.label: PL0400_vo_CMM_emo_pose_3
697882116.transcript: A real lady never backs down.

711776528.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_C
711776528.transcript: Come on guys, let's get going!

713163107.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
713163107.transcript: Hey, don't go asking for trouble!

713353705.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
713353705.transcript: Do you think I'm getting closer to Master's level?

731929094.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
731929094.transcript: Come on, guys! Keep it up!

736883985.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
736883985.transcript: Your explosive fighting style reminds me of my master's magic.

740299702.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
740299702.transcript: The spell is mightier than the sword.

744600494.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
744600494.transcript: You were like, bam! And then I was like, pow!

745555480.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
745555480.transcript: I hate it here, but when the going gets tough...

745988186.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_la_self_3
745988186.transcript: Get a face full of this!

746806095.label: PL0400_vo_CMM_emo_pose_2
746806095.transcript: Look at me! Gifted and cute!

754942440.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
754942440.transcript: We'll save this city no matter what!

758759959.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
758759959.transcript: Aww, I want Ice Swords too!

762586625.label: PL0400_vo_CMM_emo_win_5
762586625.transcript: Master Zaka, hope I did you proud.

808966284.label: PL0400_vo_DUO_recovery_C_PL0600
808966284.transcript: I know I can do this!

822897851.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
822897851.transcript: I can't have you showing me up now, can I?

824224593.label: PL0400_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL1000
824224593.transcript: Time to take out the trash!

828089773.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
828089773.transcript: They're gonna tell stories about us.

834977519.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
834977519.transcript: Big Bad Bahamut's our enemy, huh? Bring it on!

835903796.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
835903796.transcript: I'll preen when and where I please, thank you.

836130296.label: PL0400_vo_CMM_emo_call_emergency_3
836130296.transcript: Move it or lose it, guys!

848587833.label: PL0400_vo_DUO_rescue1_A_4
848587833.transcript: Oh no, you're not finished yet.

848868334.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_PL0600_2
848868334.transcript: Do you think it's still dangerous?

862004954.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
862004954.transcript: You guys wanted to do this the hard way!

879278822.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
879278822.transcript: That was great! You were awesome!

883419034.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
883419034.transcript: I'm not scared of this creepy island.

885561814.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_PL0600_3
885561814.transcript: It's so nice working with you, Rosetta!

885782202.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
885782202.transcript: Skyfarers, don't take crap from anybody!

890080530.label: PL0400_vo_CMM_emo_yay_2
890080530.transcript: This is the best day ever!

895362195.label: PL0400_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_3
895362195.transcript: We have to get you healed quick!

897658361.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
897658361.transcript: We're way stronger now! Let's get him!

897720315.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
897720315.transcript: No, we're gonna spank you, silly!

900447771.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
900447771.transcript: Now let's do that every time!

903722954.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
903722954.transcript: Let's move it to the altar.

910390118.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
910390118.transcript: Can't look away for one second!

920376183.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
920376183.transcript: This is too much! Can we really beat her?

922932352.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
922932352.transcript: You don't get to sacrifice the world under our watch!

928112540.label: PL0400_vo_ETC_quest_clear_6
928112540.transcript: Haha! Told you we could handle it.

950201539.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
950201539.transcript: Give it up, Lilith! You're done!

957520293.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C
957520293.transcript: Hey! I'm always ready to go!

958913631.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
958913631.transcript: Let's calm this bad boy down.

967290423.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_1
967290423.transcript: Great! Don't want to get left behind.

969353370.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_A
969353370.transcript: Move it or lose it, Avya freaks!

981492305.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0100
981492305.transcript: Overdo it? I'm just getting started.

982280106.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0100
982280106.transcript: It's what you get for messing with the best!

994197995.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
994197995.transcript: We can't give up! Not now, not ever!

996930599.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_2
996930599.transcript: And that wasn't even our final form.

1003773736.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
1003773736.transcript: Look at what they've done to Seed Hollow! It's horrible!

1017122655.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
1017122655.transcript: Do all astrals have power like that?

1017165112.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
1017165112.transcript: Do you want to see more of my magic?

1019465890.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_weakpoint
1019465890.transcript: Of course. Even amateurs know how to aim for weak spots.

1022216265.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
1022216265.transcript: Primal Shmimal. My magic can take it.

1028145042.label: PL0400_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL0600_3
1028145042.transcript: No, I just got too cocky.

1029276246.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
1029276246.transcript: Who put new batteries in this old geezer?

1037877453.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
1037877453.transcript: Back in Vaults, my master made me practice that spell a ton.

1040804641.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
1040804641.transcript: Yes, I've got room to grow!

1041895138.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
1041895138.transcript: That's what you deserve for messing with Rosetta!

1047014556.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_B
1047014556.transcript: This place is bursting with mana!

1048251444.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
1048251444.transcript: Maybe I should be a warrior too!

1054089390.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
1054089390.transcript: Okay, so you don't mess up all the time.

1064604166.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
1064604166.transcript: We can't let Galan's outdo us.

1070391818.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
1070391818.transcript: You won't get the last laugh!

1073656764.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
1073656764.transcript: Okay, then I'll heal your wounds.

12043996.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
12043996.transcript: Now I know why you call it noble execution.

25813530.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
25813530.transcript: That burst was huge, but you didn't even flinch.

68075096.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
68075096.transcript: Um, I couldn't keep up with you there. You didn't get caught in my magic, right?

70167788.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
70167788.transcript: Wow, she's like the perfect picture of an elegant lady.

102527610.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
102527610.transcript: Ah, well, you know. Genius strikes now and then.

113019360.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
113019360.transcript: From my next trick, I'll make you disappear.

132125078.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
132125078.transcript: How do you keep your hands from getting zapped by that thing?

137827751.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
137827751.transcript: Whoa! Maglielle thinks I'm elegant and refined!

148110786.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
148110786.transcript: You don't have to say anything, Rosetta. We were magic.

148537413.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
148537413.transcript: Okay, just don't do anything too dangerous.

163690524.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
163690524.transcript: Arrows and magic are a busted combo!

173943586.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
173943586.transcript: Ars Magna! That spell is so cool!

178139634.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
178139634.transcript: I like to leave them breathless.

184532430.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
184532430.transcript: Hey, big guy, don't run out of steam yet.

195019395.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
195019395.transcript: Aww, I didn't know you cared.

217747986.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
217747986.transcript: We can't afford to hold back!

220266012.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
220266012.transcript: Come on! This isn't a game!

254883861.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
254883861.transcript: You're pushing it, but I guess the fight's not won yet.

256257403.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1900
256257403.transcript: Careful, Id! Don't get caught in the blast!

258176734.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
258176734.transcript: Yep, no time to slack off now.

258879734.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
258879734.transcript: I almost felt like a grown-up on that one.

277635183.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
277635183.transcript: You ought to thank my master for teaching me.

289011301.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0500
289011301.transcript: We lit them up like fireworks.

338579096.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600
338579096.transcript: I'll never get tired of watching your roses bloom.

339332002.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
339332002.transcript: Oh, Fraux! If only I could kick like you!

351173529.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
351173529.transcript: Flemec must use magic to summon lightning, right?

389615089.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
389615089.transcript: I'm gonna need that firepower again!

389832443.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
389832443.transcript: Oh, I can put twice the oomph into the next spell.

405497880.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
405497880.transcript: Hey, do that funny thing, Rackam. What's it called? Duration?

471422251.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
471422251.transcript: It is pretty great, isn't it?

471711476.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0700
471711476.transcript: I'd cry if I accidentally blasted one of your pets.

500189022.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
500189022.transcript: Man, wish I knew how to control a swarm of magic swords.

550372125.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0900
550372125.transcript: Ha! You totally tore them a new one, Vane!

557014132.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
557014132.transcript: I'll do better on the next one.

572811613.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
572811613.transcript: If I said jump, would you say how high?

577695322.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
577695322.transcript: See that? It was all me!

617987036.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
617987036.transcript: I hope he means that in a good way.

624703499.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
624703499.transcript: Chill out, Beatrix. Wait for the rest of us.

629379349.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
629379349.transcript: Who knew fists could do so much damage?

630729926.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
630729926.transcript: Not as good as I'd like, but getting there.

641416424.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
641416424.transcript: Oh man, her chants are so cool. I should workshop something myself.

643775091.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
643775091.transcript: Couldn't have done it without ya.

716320018.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
716320018.transcript: Wonder who's the stronger, mine or yours?

716571685.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0100
716571685.transcript: I knew we had it in the bag.

731056556.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
731056556.transcript: Aw, talk about a supreme compliment.

755702710.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
755702710.transcript: Lucky for you, I can hit targets with pinpoint accuracy.

759600968.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
759600968.transcript: Can't believe I'm seeing this, but I'm actually glad he's here.

766173523.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
766173523.transcript: Whoa, big props from an old pro.

766705038.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
766705038.transcript: Wanna learn more? I'm taking students!

766953979.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
766953979.transcript: What? We're in the middle of a fight here!

787154007.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
787154007.transcript: Now be nice and let you handle the next one too, Siegfried.

810928256.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
810928256.transcript: Talk about adding fuel to the fire.

866438916.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
866438916.transcript: Thanks! I'll try not to disappoint my fans.

887488356.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
887488356.transcript: Just wait till I'm all grown up.

901560329.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
901560329.transcript: Hey, that was pretty good. Thanks.

951388617.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
951388617.transcript: Hee hee! First class magic at your service!

953223533.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
953223533.transcript: Aw, I feel all fuzzy inside.

973403856.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
973403856.transcript: Allow me to spell your doom! Okay, that was bad.

1030598383.label: PL0400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
1030598383.transcript: That was crazy! I didn't know the Eternals were so powerful!

96225354.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
96225354.transcript: Thanks, but you can start pulling your weight too, you know.

158506024.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
158506024.transcript: Okay, that was a bad joke, even by your standards.

182491582.label: PL0400_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_3
182491582.transcript: Don't know about this. Make it stop!

199331193.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
199331193.transcript: Wow, that's... coming from you, that means something!

284050107.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
284050107.transcript: No, Tweyen! I hope I grow up to be just like you!

539101981.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
539101981.transcript: I'm going to learn flight magic if it's the last thing I do!

718989888.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
718989888.transcript: Yup! Maybe we should have a friendly little spa to see who can focus better!

798047445.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
798047445.transcript: Yup. They call you the strongest in the Sky Realm for a reason.

893989283.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
893989283.transcript: Can we slow down? It's like you Eternals never run out of batteries!

918204545.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
918204545.transcript: Oh, thanks to your support, FireTweyen!

972385763.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
972385763.transcript: Jeez, Seofon, if you'd just give it your all, we'd be finished in a snap!

353123054.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
353123054.transcript: Of course I am. I've been practicing.

489410384.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
489410384.transcript: I wish I had wings so I could fly too!

728390621.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2100
728390621.transcript: Where's the next bad guy? Let me at him.

904480594.label: PL0400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
904480594.transcript: Yeah, yeah. Save the tea party for later. Got it.

977309831.label: PL0400_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_1
977309831.transcript: Ha! Ha! Ha! Take that! Not bad!
